creator: zedupsys@gmail.com
text:
Thank you for fast response.

Well, the system crashes with 8G of Dom0 RAM as well; i am using 2G for test environment to provoke the bug sooner. With 8G, the symptoms are more or less the same, just i can not panic it in 5-30 min, but have to wait a day or so.

For the option cpufreq=dom0-kernel... reading config manual, this seemed the only way to ensure that if i press power button, system (Dom0) does init 0 and shuts down. The same is that i would like to have an ability with init 0 to shut down the machine, but on panic to reboot. If there are better ways to achieve that, i just do not know how.

I will remove cpufreq=dom0-kernel and see, if it changes system behavior.
